lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Fer-de-Lance ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Fandom wiki — Anti-Xeno combat
sources.what: Guardian Gauss/Shard weapons, Interceptor heart mechanics, and caustic/lightning handling referenced for the AX loadout.

sources.label: Inara — Fer-de-Lance
sources.what: Ship reference page: stat block, hardpoint & module slot layout, sell locations.
